mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, category_id, price, stock, description, image_url, status, sort, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET name = #{name}, category_id = #{categoryId}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
